description:
Create a horizontal cross-functional flowchart in Wondershare EdrawMax documenting an IT incident management process. The diagram must include four swimlanes: 'Help Desk (Tier 1)', 'Technical Support (Tier 2)', 'Engineering (Tier 3)', and 'Management'.

The process flow should map the following:
- Help Desk (Tier 1): Start at 'Incident Reported', followed by 'Log Incident', 'Classify Severity', and a 'Can Resolve?' decision. If resolved, proceed to 'Resolve & Document' and 'Close Ticket'. If not, escalate to 'Investigate Issue' in the Technical Support lane.
- Technical Support (Tier 2): From 'Investigate Issue', include a 'Can Resolve?' decision. If resolved, 'Apply Fix' and 'Verify Fix' (connecting back to 'Close Ticket'). If not, escalate to 'Root Cause Analysis' in the Engineering lane.
- Engineering (Tier 3): Include 'Root Cause Analysis', 'Develop Fix', 'Test Fix', and 'Deploy Fix', then connect back to 'Verify Fix' in the Technical Support lane.
- Management: Include 'Notify Stakeholders' (connected from 'Classify Severity') and 'Monitor Resolution'.

Save the diagram as /home/ga/Diagrams/incident_management_swimlane.eddx and export it as /home/ga/Diagrams/incident_management_swimlane.png.
